overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game showing a character walking through a fantastical cosmic realm with floating rocks and vibrant nebula skies. The character traverses rocky terrain under shifting purple and red cosmic lighting, eventually joined by a companion.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon path in cosmic realm

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow rocky canyon toward floating crystal formations in the distance

entered.detail: large floating rock formation with glowing blue crystals suspended in the air
tall dark rock walls forming the left side of the canyon
tall dark rock walls forming the right side of the canyon
vibrant purple and blue nebula clouds visible through the canyon opening
scattered small rocks floating in the air against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon with high walls on both sides. Ahead, large floating crystal formations hover in the air against a backdrop of purple cosmic nebula. Small asteroids drift through the sky as the character progresses steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cosmic landscape with nebula sky

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the expansive cosmic nebula sky above
ambient lighting shifts from blue-purple to warm red-orange hues as the sky opens up

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward while the camera pans upward to admire the vast cosmic sky

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow canyon, the camera tilts up to reveal a breathtaking full view of the cosmic sky filled with swirling red and purple nebulae. The rocky walls fall away as the character continues walking across the open terrain, with floating asteroids scattered across the vibrant sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky ascent path with ancient ruins

events.description: a companion character joins and walks alongside the ego character

agents.ego_description: walking with a companion through the rocky terrain toward ancient ruins in the distance

notable_agents.action: companion character walking alongside ego toward the same destination

entered.detail: glowing orange-red fissure in the ground emitting light
large stone structures and archways ahead in the distance
massive flat-topped rock formation floating in the air ahead

segments.scene_description: A companion joins the character, and they walk together through the rocky landscape illuminated by red cosmic light. Glowing lava vents dot the terrain near ancient stone ruins ahead, while floating rocks drift through the fiery orange sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined rocky canyon into a vast, open cosmic expanse illuminated by shifting celestial colors. It begins with the character walking through narrow walls toward hovering crystal formations and drifting asteroids set against a purple nebula. As the character exits the canyon, the camera tilts upward to reveal a breathtaking panorama of swirling red and purple skies while the terrain opens into a wide landscape. The scene then shifts as a companion joins the character, moving together through a rocky environment now bathed in red cosmic light. Finally, the path leads toward ancient stone ruins and glowing lava vents under a fiery orange sky filled with floating rocks.
